creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad The most incredible new VR experience has just opened in London and it will transport you to the 1300s in Medieval France 🏰 This is The Last Stronghold, an experience developed with world-leading historians to reconstruct the largest fortified medieval city. Become part of the story, witness the art of swordsmanship and explore freely for total immersion! ⚔️

🎟️ Book on the @fever_uk app and use code EXPLORINGLONDON10 for 10% off tickets! Adults from £18.50, children from 14.50
⏳ Duration: 45-minute VR session
📍 W12 Shopping Centre, Shepherd’s Bush Green, W12 8PP
👤 Age requirement: 10+
 
Share this with someone who would love to go!
#feverambassador #thelaststronghold #thingstodoinlondon

geo_locations: W12 Shopping Centre, Shepherd’s Bush Green, W12 8PP
pinned_places: W12 Shopping Centre, Shepherd’s Bush Green, W12 8PP

transcription.text: This is London's brand new VR experience and it will take you to the heart of medieval France. It's historically accurate so you really feel like you've stepped back into the 1300s and you'll be guided by a young lord from the north called Simon into a forted city where people are rising in unrest. The technology used is cutting edge and the entire thing is created with remarkable historical accuracy. As you become the character in the story you'll learn the art of sword combat that's been designed by professional stunt performers and you can move completely freely within each scene for total immersion. It's really like walking through history where you watch medieval life come to life around you. This is the last stronghold, it is incredible and we have a 10% off discount code. Find it in the caption.
